product.operatedBy: Operated by {{brand}}. Free cancellation up to 30 days before departure.

home.heroTitle: Adventures measured in stories, not miles
home.heroTagline: Small-group trips led by local guides — coastlines, vineyards, and mountain trails at a human pace.

detail.notFound: That trip has sailed — we couldn't find it.

about.title: About {{brand}}
about.intro: We started with one rented van and a conviction that the best trips are the ones you could never plan from a desk.
about.missionBody: Keep groups small, keep guides local, and leave every trail better than we found it.
about.promiseBody: Real itineraries, honest prices, and a human on the phone when plans change.
